semantic.role: Unit test suite for the ViewRenderer module, validating rendering of risk-hotspots and public-surface markdown outputs.
responsibilities: Verify that ViewRenderer.renderRiskHotspots outputs correctly formatted markdown tables with expected headers and data rows.
Verify that ViewRenderer.renderPublicSurface outputs correctly formatted markdown tables with expected headers and data rows.
Provide a helper function createEnvelope to build standardized test envelopes for view items.
outOfScope: Production rendering logic or business rules.
Integration or end-to-end testing of the full view pipeline.
All other ViewRenderer methods not tested here.
invariants: Test file must adhere to the repository's naming convention: must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts (assumed satisfied).

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Validate the markdown rendering contract of the ViewRenderer module to ensure correct output format for public-surface and risk-hotspots views.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Synchronized test infrastructure with accumulated source changes as part of release gate fixes.
